# Pouya Mansournia

> Robotics Systems Architect, Mechatronics Engineer, Product Builder, Technical Founder, Entrepreneur, and Open-Source Framework Builder.

Pouya Mansournia builds robotics, automation, embedded electronics, precision motion, warehouse automation, product execution systems, and open-source execution frameworks. The website is a technical and product portfolio for robotics and AI engineering opportunities, product manager and product builder discovery, entrepreneurship, PhD applications, technical founder credibility, and open-source systems work.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://mansournia.info/
- About: https://mansournia.info/#/about
- Projects: https://mansournia.info/#/works
- Research: https://mansournia.info/#/publications
- Engineering Notes: https://mansournia.info/#/blog
- Open Source Systems: https://mansournia.info/#/open-source
- Contact: https://mansournia.info/#/contact

## Open Source Systems

- Foundry OS: https://github.com/Pouya-Mansournia/FoundryOS
  - Product and startup execution operating framework.
  - Topics: product strategy, GTM, business model design, team structure, founder decision-making.
- REOS: https://github.com/Pouya-Mansournia/REOS
  - Robotics engineering operating system.
  - Topics: robotics system design, hardware/software integration, documentation, testing, deployment, standards.
- ARCHON OS: https://github.com/Pouya-Mansournia/ARCHON
  - AI agentic architecture and decision operating system.
  - Topics: AI-agent workflows, software architecture, technical decision-making, system design, engineering execution loops.
- GrabCAD Library: https://grabcad.com/pouya.mansournia-1
  - Public engineering CAD model library.
  - Topics: mechanical design, robotics components, automation hardware, CAD references, open engineering sharing.

## Technical Focus

- Robotics systems architecture
- Mechatronics engineering
- Product management
- Product building
- Entrepreneurship
- Technical founder work
- Venture building
- Product strategy and product execution
- Autonomous mobile robots, AGVs, AMRs, and delivery robots
- Warehouse automation, wheel sorters, conveyors, put-to-light and pick-to-light systems
- Embedded electronics, PCB design, STM32, ESP32, motor control, industrial IoT
- Precision motion, piezo actuation, flexure mechanisms, nano-positioning
- Open-source frameworks for engineering execution and AI-agent workflows
